text: We use encryption to protect your personal information during transmission and storage.
You may request access to your data and ask us to correct inaccurate personal information.
You can delete your account and request deletion of your personal data at any time.
We do not sell your personal information to advertisers or unrelated third parties.
We collect only the information needed to provide the service and follow data minimization practices.
You may opt out of marketing emails by using the unsubscribe link in each email.
We allow you to withdraw consent for optional processing through your privacy settings.
Personal data is retained only for as long as necessary for the stated purpose.
We provide privacy controls so you can manage cookies and advertising preferences.
The service supports two-factor authentication to help keep your account secure.
We may use cookies to remember your preferences and improve website performance.
We collect usage data such as pages viewed, clicks, and session duration for analytics.
We may share information with service providers who help us operate the platform.
We may collect your IP address, browser type, and device information when you use the service.
We use analytics tools to understand user behavior and improve our products.
We may send marketing communications about new features unless you opt out.
Third-party integrations may process limited account information to provide connected features.
We may retain your information to comply with legal requirements and resolve disputes.
Advertising partners may receive limited technical identifiers to measure campaign performance.
We may process approximate location information based on your IP address.
We may sell your personal information to advertising partners for targeted marketing.
By using the service, you waive your right to participate in any class action lawsuit.
All disputes must be resolved through binding arbitration and not in court.
We are not liable for loss of data, lost profits, or damages arising from your use of the service.
You grant us an irrevocable, perpetual, worldwide license to use your uploaded content.
We may change these terms at any time without notice to you.
We may terminate your account at any time at our sole discretion without explanation.
We may collect precise location data even when the application is running in the background.
We may share sensitive personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.
Employees may be required to work for 16 hours a day during peak business periods.
